passing_score_scale: Pass/fail; passing threshold not publicly disclosed
exam_format: Linear (computer-based, online proctored via Pearson VUE OnVUE or at authorized test centers). ACE adds Scenario-Based questions.
exam_price_notes: $500 USD; includes MCQ (120 min) plus a separate 4-hour hands-on scenario exam

testing_centers.notes: Pearson VUE test centers globally and online proctoring via Pearson VUE OnVUE. Also delivered via Alibaba Cloud Certification test centers in China and online proctoring globally.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Passport required for international candidates.
exam_rules: Closed-book; no aids; no personal devices permitted during exam. ACE includes a 4-hour hands-on scenario exam in addition to the MCQ portion. Online proctored globally via Pearson VUE OnVUE.
renewal_options: Certifications are valid for 3 years. Renewal is exam-based only: pass the current version of the same exam or a higher-level exam. No continuing education (CE) credits accepted — exam-based renewal only.

prerequisites.description: ACP Cloud Computing or equivalent professional-level experience

retake_policy.notes: 14-day waiting period between failed attempts. No stated maximum number of attempts. Full exam fee required for each attempt.

official_study_resources.title: Alibaba Cloud Certification Learning Path
official_study_resources.notes: Free learning paths and exam preparation materials available on Alibaba Cloud Academy.
